name: Premium Wireless Earbuds
description: Crystal clear sound with noise cancellation technology
fullDescription: Experience premium audio quality with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and seamless connectivity. Perfect for music lovers and professionals who demand the best.

reviews_data.author: John K.
reviews_data.text: Excellent sound quality! Best purchase ever.

reviews_data.author: Mike T.
reviews_data.text: Good product, but a bit pricey.

name: Smart Watch Pro
description: Feature-rich smartwatch with fitness tracking and heart rate monitor
fullDescription: Stay connected and healthy with advanced fitness tracking, heart rate monitoring, sleep tracking, and 7-day battery life. Compatible with iOS and Android.

name: Premium USB-C Cable Bundle
description: Fast charging cables with 2-year warranty
fullDescription: Pack of 3 high-quality USB-C cables with fast charging support up to 100W. Durable braided design with lifetime warranty. Perfect for home, office, and travel.

name: Leather Phone Case
description: Premium leather protective case with elegant design
fullDescription: Genuine leather case with soft interior protection. Slim profile design doesn't add bulk while providing excellent protection. Available in multiple colors.

name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: Powerful sound in a compact design, water-resistant
fullDescription: Compact yet powerful speaker with 360-degree sound, 20-hour battery life, and IPX7 water resistance. Perfect for outdoor adventures and beach trips.

name: Tempered Glass Screen Protector
description: Advanced protection with anti-fingerprint coating
fullDescription: Pack of 2 tempered glass protectors with 9H hardness. Easy installation, crystal clear display, and anti-fingerprint coating. Protects against scratches and drops.

name: Wireless Charging Pad
description: Fast wireless charging for all Qi-enabled devices
fullDescription: Fast 15W wireless charging pad compatible with all Qi-enabled devices. LED indicator, non-slip surface, and compact design. Charges through cases up to 5mm.

name: Premium Camera Lens Filter Kit
description: Professional-grade filters for photography enthusiasts
fullDescription: Complete kit includes UV, CPL, and ND filters. Perfect for photography professionals and hobbyists. Reduces glare, enhances colors, and enables creative exposure control.

name: 4K Webcam Pro
description: Crystal clear 4K video for streaming and video calls
fullDescription: Professional-grade 4K webcam with auto-focus, wide-angle lens, and built-in stereo microphone. Perfect for content creators, streamers, and professionals.

name: Mechanical Keyboard RGB
description: Gaming keyboard with customizable RGB backlighting
fullDescription: High-performance mechanical keyboard with customizable RGB lighting, aluminum frame, and hot-swappable switches. Perfect for gaming and typing.

name: USB-A Hub 7-Port
description: Expand your USB connectivity with this powered hub
fullDescription: 7-port USB 3.0 hub with independent switches and power adapter. Fast 5Gbps data transfer. Perfect for connecting multiple devices simultaneously.

name: Laptop Stand Aluminum
description: Ergonomic aluminum laptop stand for better posture
fullDescription: Premium aluminum laptop stand with adjustable height and angle. Supports laptops up to 17 inches. Folds compact for easy portability.

name: Noise Cancelling Headphones
description: Studio-quality sound with active noise cancellation
fullDescription: Over-ear headphones with active noise cancellation, 40-hour battery life, and premium sound quality. Perfect for music production and travel.

name: Portable SSD 1TB
description: Ultra-fast portable storage for on-the-go professionals
fullDescription: Compact 1TB portable SSD with USB-C connectivity. Up to 1050MB/s transfer speed. Durable, shock-resistant design. Perfect for photographers and videographers.

name: Wireless Mouse Pro
description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with precision tracking
fullDescription: Wireless mouse with 2.4GHz connectivity, adjustable DPI, and 18-month battery life. Ergonomic design reduces hand fatigue during long work sessions.

name: USB-C Docking Station
description: All-in-one docking solution for USB-C laptops
fullDescription: 13-in-1 docking station with HDMI, USB-A, SD card reader, and power delivery. Compatible with all USB-C devices. Perfect for MacBook and Windows laptops.

name: Smart LED Desk Lamp
description: Smart LED lamp with adjustable brightness and color
fullDescription: LED desk lamp with smart control, adjustable brightness (0-100%), and color temperature. Compatible with smart home systems. USB charging port built-in.

name: Gaming Mouse Pad XL
description: Large mouse pad with smooth surface and waterproof base
fullDescription: Oversized gaming mouse pad (800x300mm) with smooth cloth surface. Non-slip rubber base prevents sliding. Perfect for gaming and productivity.

name: Webcam Light Ring
description: Ring light for perfect video call lighting
fullDescription: LED ring light with adjustable brightness, color temperature, and phone holder. USB powered. Perfect for video calls, streaming, and content creation.

name: HDMI 2.1 Cable 3m
description: Premium HDMI 2.1 cable for 4K@120Hz video
fullDescription: High-speed HDMI 2.1 cable supporting 4K@120Hz, 8K@60Hz. Gold-plated connectors. 3-meter length with durable braided design.

name: Power Bank 20000mAh
description: Fast charging power bank with dual USB-C and USB-A ports
fullDescription: 20000mAh capacity power bank with dual USB-C ports and USB-A. Supports PD 3.0 fast charging. Compact design, perfect for travel.

name: Phone Stand Adjustable
description: Universal phone stand with adjustable angles
fullDescription: Adjustable phone stand supporting all smartphone sizes. Premium aluminum construction. Perfect for desk, table, or countertop use.

name: Microphone USB Condenser
description: Professional USB condenser microphone for streaming
fullDescription: Studio-quality USB condenser microphone with cardioid polar pattern. Plug-and-play setup. Ideal for podcasting, streaming, and voice-overs.

name: Cable Organizer Set
description: Organize your cables with this complete organizer set
fullDescription: Complete cable organizer set with cable clips, sleeves, and labels. Keep your workspace tidy and organized. Easy installation.

name: Laptop Cooling Pad
description: Keep your laptop cool with this cooling pad
fullDescription: Laptop cooling pad with multiple fans and adjustable height. USB powered. Reduces laptop temperature by 10-15 degrees. Supports laptops up to 17 inches.

name: USB-C Hub 12-in-1
description: Ultimate connectivity solution with 12 ports
fullDescription: 12-in-1 USB-C hub with HDMI, USB 3.0, SD card reader, and more. 4K video output. 100W power delivery. Perfect for MacBook and USB-C laptops.

name: Portable Projector Mini
description: Compact projector for presentations and movies
fullDescription: Mini portable projector with 1080p resolution, 150 lumens brightness. LED technology, quiet operation. HDMI, USB, and wireless connectivity.

name: Webcam HD 1080p
description: Clear HD webcam for video calls
fullDescription: 1080p HD webcam with auto-focus and built-in microphone. USB plug-and-play. Perfect for video conferencing and streaming.

name: Gaming Controller Wireless
description: Professional gaming controller with wireless connectivity
fullDescription: Wireless gaming controller compatible with PC and consoles. Responsive buttons, rumble feedback. 25-hour battery life. Premium build quality.

name: Monitor Light Bar
description: Monitor light bar for better screen lighting
fullDescription: Monitor light bar mounted above screen. Eliminates glare and eye strain. Adjustable brightness and color temperature. USB powered.

name: Graphics Tablet 10x6
description: Digital drawing tablet for artists and designers
fullDescription: 10x6 inch graphics tablet with pressure sensitivity. Compatible with Photoshop, Illustrator. USB powered. Perfect for digital art and design.

name: KVM Switch 2 Port
description: Switch between two computers with one keyboard/mouse
fullDescription: 2-port KVM switch to control multiple computers with single keyboard and mouse. Hot-key switching. Compact design.

name: External Hard Drive 2TB
description: Reliable external backup storage
fullDescription: 2TB external hard drive with USB 3.0 connectivity. Fast data transfer. Perfect for backup and storage. Portable and durable design.

name: USB-A Splitter 4-Way
description: Simple 4-port USB splitter
fullDescription: Compact 4-port USB 2.0 splitter. No external power needed. Great for hubs. Compatible with all USB devices.

name: Monitor Mount Stand
description: Ergonomic monitor stand with storage
fullDescription: Premium monitor stand with adjustable height and tilt. Built-in storage for keyboard and accessories. Supports up to 30 inch monitors.

name: Keyboard Wrist Rest
description: Ergonomic wrist rest for comfortable typing
fullDescription: Memory foam wrist rest matching keyboard width. Reduces wrist strain during typing. Non-slip base.

name: USB Flash Drive 128GB
description: Fast USB 3.0 flash drive with high capacity
fullDescription: 128GB USB 3.0 flash drive with high-speed data transfer. Durable metal design. Perfect for file transfer and backup.

name: Desktop Organizer 5-Tier
description: Keep your desk organized with this 5-tier organizer
fullDescription: 5-tier desk organizer made from bamboo. Compartments for pens, papers, and gadgets. Natural wood finish.

name: Cable Sleeve Braided 2m
description: Protective braided cable sleeve
fullDescription: 2-meter braided cable sleeve for organizing and protecting cables. Expandable design. Perfect for cable management.

name: Monitor Privacy Filter
description: Privacy screen for monitor protection
fullDescription: Screen privacy filter for 22-24 inch monitors. 30-degree viewing angle protection. Reduces blue light. Easy attachment.

name: RGB LED Strip 10m
description: Smart RGB LED strip for room ambiance
fullDescription: 10-meter RGB LED strip with 16 million colors. WiFi control via app. Voice control compatible. Durable 3M adhesive.

name: Phone Tripod Professional
description: Sturdy tripod for phone photography
fullDescription: Professional phone tripod with adjustable head and height. Supports all smartphone sizes. Compact and lightweight for travel.

name: Surge Protector 6-Outlet
description: Power strip with surge protection
fullDescription: 6-outlet power strip with surge protection and USB ports. LED indicator. 1.8-meter cord. Protects against power spikes.

name: Smart Power Strip WiFi
description: WiFi-enabled smart power strip
fullDescription: Smart power strip with WiFi control. Individual outlet switching via app. Voice control compatible. Energy monitoring.

name: Document Scanner Portable
description: Portable scanner for documents and photos
fullDescription: Handheld portable scanner with USB connectivity. Scans documents and photos in color. OCR software included. Compact and lightweight.

name: Bluetooth Desk Speaker
description: High-quality desktop Bluetooth speaker
fullDescription: Compact desk speaker with rich stereo sound. Bluetooth 5.0 connectivity. 8-hour battery life. USB and 3.5mm jack inputs.

name: Keyboard Mechanical Wireless
description: Wireless mechanical keyboard with premium switches
fullDescription: Premium wireless mechanical keyboard with hot-swappable switches. Programmable keys. 200-hour battery life. Aluminum frame.

name: USB Hub Extension Cord
description: USB hub with 2-meter extension cord
fullDescription: 4-port USB hub with 2-meter extension cord. USB 3.0 connectivity. Perfect for reaching USB ports on the back of computers.

name: HDMI Splitter 1 in 2 Out
description: HDMI splitter for dual display setup
fullDescription: 1-in 2-out HDMI splitter supporting 4K@30Hz. No external power needed. Perfect for dual monitor setup.

name: Desk Mat Mousepad Large
description: Large desk mat and mousepad combo
fullDescription: Large desk mat (80x40cm) with integrated mousepad. Premium leather surface. Non-slip rubber base. Perfect for gaming and work.
